info.title: Seismic Library Content Management
info.description: Manage files, folders, and items in Seismic Library teamsites. Supports file upload, download, metadata management, folder operations, item queries, and content deletion.

post.summary: Invoke Seismic Library Content Management MCP
post.description: Model Context Protocol endpoint for Copilot Studio. Exposes Seismic Library Content Management operations via JSON-RPC 2.0 for file, folder, URL, and teamsite management.
Upload a new file to a teamsite library folder. Provide the file content as a base64-encoded string. Max file size is 2 GB.

parameters.name: resolveNameCollision
parameters.description: Automatically append an index if a name conflict exists.

name.description: The name of the file (without extension).

parentFolderId.description: The parent folder GUID. Use 'root' for the root folder.

format.description: The file format (e.g., pptx, pdf, docx).

description.description: An optional description for the file.

get.description: Get the metadata and properties for a specific file in a teamsite library.

patch.description: Update a file's name, parent folder, owner, description, expiration, or custom properties.

name.description: The new name for the file.

parentFolderId.description: The GUID of the target parent folder. Use 'root' for the root folder.

ownerId.description: The userId of the new owner.

expiresAt.description: The expiration date in UTC YYYY-MM-DD format.

get.description: Get the download URL for a file's binary contents.

parameters.name: redirect
parameters.description: If false, returns a JSON body with the download URL. If true, returns a 302 redirect.

200.description: File download URL and content returned.

downloadUrl.description: The URL to download the file.

contentType.description: The MIME type of the file.

put.description: Upload a new version of an existing file. Provide the file content as a base64-encoded string. Max file size is 2 GB.

content.description: The base64-encoded file content for the new version.

post.description: Create a new folder inside a teamsite. Use 'root' as the parentFolderId to create in the root.

name.description: The name of the new folder.

parentFolderId.description: The parent folder GUID. Use 'root' for the root folder.

get.description: Get the metadata for a specific folder in a teamsite library.

patch.description: Rename or move a folder by updating its name or parent folder.

name.description: The new name for the folder.

parentFolderId.description: The target parent folder GUID to move the folder.

get.description: Get the list of files, folders, and URLs in a given folder.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of items to return (max 1000).

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Number of items to skip for pagination.

parameters.name: includeProperties
parameters.description: Include custom properties in the response.

parameters.name: includeExpiration
parameters.description: Include expiration dates in the response.

totalCount.description: Total number of items in the folder.

get.description: Get information and properties for any item type (file, folder, or URL) in the library.

delete.description: Delete any item type (file, folder, or URL) from the library.

parameters.name: libraryContentId
parameters.description: The identifier of the item to delete.

get.description: Search for items in the library using query parameters such as name, type, or modification date.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Filter by item type (file, folder, url).

parameters.name: modifiedSince
parameters.description: Filter by items modified after this date (ISO 8601).

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of items to return.

get.description: Get all versions for an item in the library.

post.description: Copy a file, folder, or URL to a target folder within the same teamsite.

parameters.name: libraryContentId
parameters.description: The identifier of the item to copy.

parentFolderId.description: The target folder GUID to copy into.

newName.description: Optional new name for the copied item.

post.description: Copy a file to a target folder within the same teamsite.

parameters.name: libraryContentId
parameters.description: The identifier of the file to copy.

parentFolderId.description: The target folder GUID to copy into.

newName.description: Optional new name for the copied file.

post.description: Copy a URL item to a target folder within the same teamsite.

parameters.name: libraryContentId
parameters.description: The identifier of the URL item to copy.

parentFolderId.description: The target folder GUID to copy into.

newName.description: Optional new name for the copied URL item.

post.description: Add a URL item to the library in a specified folder.

name.description: The display name for the URL.

parentFolderId.description: The parent folder GUID. Use 'root' for the root folder.

put.summary: Get or create folder by path
put.description: Get an existing folder or create it if it does not exist, using a path string.

get.description: Get the full list of teamsites in the tenant.

isDefault.description: Whether this is the default teamsite.

get.description: Get the name and details of a specific teamsite.

isDefault.description: Whether this is the default teamsite.

get.description: Get the download URL for a specific version of a file.

parameters.name: libraryVersionId
parameters.description: The identifier of the file version.

parameters.name: redirect
parameters.description: If false, returns a JSON body with the download URL. If true, returns a 302 redirect.

200.description: File version download URL and content returned.

downloadUrl.description: The URL to download the file version.

contentType.description: The MIME type of the file.

post.description: Copy a folder and its contents to a target folder within the same teamsite.

parameters.name: libraryContentId
parameters.description: The identifier of the folder to copy.

parentFolderId.description: The target folder GUID to copy into.

newName.description: Optional new name for the copied folder.

get.description: Get the metadata and properties for a URL item in the library.

parameters.name: libraryContentId
parameters.description: The identifier of the URL item.

patch.description: Update a URL item's name, parent folder, URL value, or properties.

parameters.name: libraryContentId
parameters.description: The identifier of the URL item.

parentFolderId.description: The target parent folder GUID to move the URL item.

openInNewWindow.description: Whether the URL opens in a new window.

description.description: The description for the URL item.

isDeleted.description: Whether the user has been deleted.
Whether the user has been deleted.

assignedToProfiles.description: Profiles this item is assigned to.

isDeleted.description: Whether the user has been deleted.
Whether the user has been deleted.

openInNewWindow.description: Whether the URL opens in a new window.

assignedToProfiles.description: Profiles this item is assigned to.
